werNormalizedGold: 你 好 能 听 见 我 说 话 吗
werNormalizedPredicted: 你 好 能 听 到 我 话 吗
sigWerNormalizedGold: 你 好 能 听 见 我 说 话 吗
sigWerNormalizedPredicted: 你 好 能 听 到 我 话 吗

sigWerErrors.reason: '听见' means 'hear', while '听到' also means 'hear' in Chinese. In this context, both are commonly used and the meaning of the sentence is unchanged.
Omitting '说' (speak) changes 'hear me speak' to just 'hear me', which slightly alters the meaning but does not derail the overall intent of the sentence.
